message:
feat(fp-index): add Index equals/identical/value_counts/shift/any/all parity (frankenpandas-3arq)

Six pandas-parity methods on Index:
- equals(other) — label equality, name-agnostic (pd.Index.equals).
- identical(other) — label + name equality (pd.Index.identical).
- value_counts() — Vec<(IndexLabel, usize)> sorted by descending count,
  first-seen on ties (pd.Index.value_counts).
- shift(periods, fill) — positional shift with fill for vacated slots
  (pd.Index.shift; freq-aware shift out of scope).
- any() / all() — boolean reductions using a shared truthiness helper
  (non-zero ints, non-empty strings, non-zero timedeltas/datetimes,
  missing → false). all() on empty index returns true (pandas
  convention).

Co-lands frankenpandas-k659 (value_counts), aqj4 (shift), qkhl (any/all).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
